---
title: "Teaching"
editor: visual
---

::: indent-block
All courses taught at UBC Vancouver unless otherwise noted. Content for each
course is in the specific Canvas site for each term (accessible to enrolled
students and teaching team only), but generic syllabi are available via links
below.
:::

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Current or upcoming courses

:::: indent-block
### BIOL 300: Fundamentals of Biostatistics

::: indent-block
#### 2025/26 Academic year

-   2026 S2, Section 951, [Coordinator]{.role-coordinator}
    ([Instructor]{.role-instructor}: Mike Whitlock)

#### 2026/27 Academic year

-   2026/27 W1, Section TBD, [Coordinator]{.role-coordinator}
    ([Instructor]{.role-instructor}: Kaitlyn Gaynor)
-   2026/27 W2, Sections TBD and TBD, [Instructor]{.role-instructor}
:::
::::

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Courses taught

::: indent-block
| Academic year | Term | Course | Section(s) | Role | Notes |
|----|----|----|----|----|----|
| 2025/26 | 2025W2 | [BIOL 300](files/Syllabus_BIOL300.pdf) | 201, 202 | [Instructor]{.role-instructor} |  |
| 2025/26 | 2025W1 | [BIOL 300](files/Syllabus_BIOL300.pdf) | 101 | [Instructor]{.role-instructor} | Jointly with Kaitlyn Gaynor |
| 2024/25 | 2025S2 | [BIOL 300](files/Syllabus_BIOL300.pdf) | 951 | [Coordinator]{.role-coordinator} | Instructor: Mike Whitlock |
| 2024/25 | 2024W1 | [BIOL 300](files/Syllabus_BIOL300_2019.pdf) | 101 | [Instructor]{.role-instructor} |  |
| 2019/20 | 2019W1 | [SCIE 300](files/Syllabus_SCIE300_2019W1.pdf) | 111 | [Instructor]{.role-instructor} |  |
:::

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
